overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded character jogging through a bustling medieval Middle Eastern marketplace. The character moves from an open sandy street lined with sandstone buildings and palm trees, through a covered bazaar corridor with pottery stalls, and into a sunlit courtyard with a large central tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market street with sandstone buildings

events.description: rider on horseback passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: jogging through the busy market street, weaving between pedestrians and vendors

notable_agents.action: rider on black horse trotting past the character
child in simple robes running ahead of the character

entered.detail: multi-story historic stone buildings with arched windows and balconies
tall palm trees providing sparse shade over the market street
wooden stall with stacked wicker baskets and goods
blue fabric canopy extending from building facade
dark banner with circular emblem hanging from wooden post

segments.scene_description: The character jogs through a sunlit open market street lined with sandstone buildings and palm trees. A rider on horseback passes by on the right while various pedestrians walk through the sandy thoroughfare. Market stalls with wicker baskets line the left side under a blue canvas awning.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area with flower beds and stone steps leading to covered bazaar

events.description: character begins ascending stone steps toward covered market entrance
approaching the covered bazaar entrance with hanging textiles

agents.ego_description: climbing stone steps flanked by red flower beds, approaching the covered market entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in brown robes standing beside the flower bed

entered.detail: raised stone planter filled with red blooming flowers
weathered stone stairs leading upward to the bazaar
wooden stall displaying clay pots and ceramic vessels

segments.scene_description: The character ascends stone steps flanked by vibrant red flower beds, moving from the open street toward a covered bazaar entrance. The lighting becomes more diffused as the character approaches the shaded corridor. A pottery stall appears on the right while the open sky becomes partially obscured by the approaching roof structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bazaar corridor with textile and pottery merchants

events.description: enters the covered bazaar corridor with dappled sunlight filtering through
moving deeper into the covered area with purple flowers visible on the right

agents.ego_description: moving through the narrow covered market corridor, passing pottery displays and hanging textiles

notable_agents.action: vendor in green robes standing beside pottery shelves

entered.detail: wooden beam structure with fabric covering providing shade
tall wooden racks holding stacked pottery and ceramic goods
ornate patterned carpets laid out on the ground and hanging
clusters of purple flowers hanging from the wooden structure
tall narrow green trees visible at the corridor exit

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow covered bazaar corridor shaded by a wooden roof structure. Sunlight filters through creating dappled patterns on the ornate textile rugs covering the ground. Wooden shelving units display pottery on the right while purple flowers hang from the beams. The corridor opens ahead to reveal tall cypress trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with central tree and gathering of people

events.description: exits the covered bazaar into a bright open courtyard with a large central tree
character slows to a stop and pans to observe the courtyard surroundings

agents.ego_description: pausing at the courtyard entrance to observe the gathered crowd and market activity under the central tree

notable_agents.action: group of robed figures gathered in conversation under the tree

entered.detail: large mature tree with spreading branches providing shade over the plaza
spacious open area with patterned stone paving
red fabric canopy over market stalls in the background

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered bazaar into a sunlit open courtyard dominated by a large central tree. The character stops at the entrance to observe the scene, where groups of robed NPCs gather and converse in the shade. Market stalls with red canopies are visible in the background beyond the tree, and the space opens up to show more of the sandstone architecture surrounding the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open market street into a shaded bazaar before emerging into a wide, sunlit courtyard. It begins with the character jogging through a sandy thoroughfare lined with sandstone buildings and palm trees, passing a rider on horseback and stalls under blue canvas awnings. As the character ascends stone steps flanked by red flower beds, the lighting shifts from bright sunlight to diffused shade upon entering a covered bazaar. The scene then moves through a narrow corridor where dappled light falls on ornate textile rugs and pottery shelves, before the path opens up toward tall cypress trees. Finally, the camera emerges from the wooden roof structure into a sprawling plaza dominated by a large central tree and groups of robed figures gathering beneath red canopies.
